prestazioni: Supercharged 6.2L HEMI V8 (Engine Code: SRT6.2L) with a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger (12 psi boost), ported cylinder heads by Livernois Motorsports, and a custom camshaft profile (246/254 duration, 0.624/0.630 lift) for 850+ WHP on E85 fuel

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: Getrag Punch Powerglide 8HP90 transmission with a Sonnax billet torque converter (4,200 stall), billet input shaft, and a Differential Dynamics 4.56:1 gear set with a Detroit Truetrac LSD for the 9.25" rear axle

Custom fabricated long-tube headers by Stainless Works (1.875" primaries, 3.5" collectors) paired with a Borla Pro XS 3.5" cat-back exhaust system (dual 4" black ceramic-coated tips) and a TTi X-pipe with resonated delete for optimal scavenging
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (REBEL GT-specific fender flares, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with custom matte military green wrap (3M 2080-G12) and exposed carbon fiber accents

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (rebound/height adjustable) with custom valving for the REBEL GT chassis, paired with Eibach ERS 1000lb/in springs and polyurethane bushings for the control arms (Energy Suspension 9.5161G)

Custom fabricated 22" Forgeline GA3R wheels (9.5" front, 11.5" rear) with a satin black finish, wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler 325/50R22 tires (stretched fitment), and paired with Baer 6P 15.5" two-piece rotors with ERADISPEED 6-piston calipers (front) and 4-piston (rear)
